features: 【JoyPrinting 378XL Ink Cartridges Multipack】【1】Latest upgraded chips ensure Perfect Compatibilty with brand printers, Compatible Ink Cartridge Replacement for Epson 378XL Ink Cartridges (Not original)【2】Print vibrant colours, bold & sharp text, crisp & clean documents that last for decades.【3】 Brilliant Cloor Gamut, Smooth Color and textures, good for your printer. Hard to fade and spread, good to save your files!

【Compatible Printer】100% Compatible with Expression Photo XP-8500XP-8505/XP-8600/XP‑8605/XP-8700/XP-15000, XP8500 XP8505 XP8600 XP 8605 XP 8700 XP 15000 Printers, Tips: Please confirm your printer model and ink cartridge model before placing your order.
【High Page Yield】Approximately 500 pages per Black Ink Cartridge and 830 pages per Colour 378XL Ink Cartridge (At 5% coverage of A4 paper)

【Package Contents】Replacement for Epson 378 378XL Ink Cartridges Multipack 6 Packs (Including 1x 378XL Black, 1x 378XL Cyan, 1x 378XL Magenta, 1x 378XL Yellow, 1x 378XL Light Cyan, 1x 378XL Light Magenta)

【Print with Confidence】Each JoyPrinting Epson 378XL 378 XL ink cartridge is individually vacuum sealed, Print out clear print quality and vivid colors. Fully tested in high-tech facility and under the strict quality control, JoyPrinting Compatible Epson 378XL ink cartridges are all under ISO9001, ISO14001 and RoHS Certified. Strict testing before delivery from factory, Reliable Quality.
